creator: nv_bsd@videotron.ca
text:
My system has artifacts showing randomly and not only in the panel but in different areas of the display.

So far, a reboot fixes the problem.

When I shutdown the computer and switch the hard disk to another that has a different system (OpenBSD and Linux), the issue never occurs, what makes me think it's an issue with the FreeBSD driver.

My system has a Intel HD3000 gpu.
